Class AsyncApi30VisitorAdapter

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.asyncapi.v3x.v30.visitors.AsyncApi30VisitorAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
AsyncApi30Visitor, AsyncApi3xVisitor, AsyncApiVisitor, Visitor
public class AsyncApi30VisitorAdapter extends Object implements AsyncApi30Visitor
